codeReview.summary: The feature implementation satisfies the scaffolding requirements: Bun workspace monorepo structure, Hono API on 3100 with GET /api/health, Vite React client on 3101 with /api proxy, Drizzle config, dependency installation, and verification evidence for server/client startup, proxy, and typecheck.

issues.description: The default DB path is './data/68kb.db', which is CWD-dependent and inconsistent with drizzle.config.ts ('../../data/68kb.db'). When DB_FILE_NAME is unset, workspace-invoked scripts can target an unintended DB location.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Bun setup reference material is misleading for Bun type packages: worker had to replace '@types/bun' with 'bun-types' to make typecheck pass reliably.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/research/BUN_SHADCN_REFERENCE.md:152 recommends 'bun add -D drizzle-kit @types/bun'; transcript skeleton shows debugging and replacement to bun-types (entries around lines 650-657 and 1069).

sharedStateObservations.observation: Testing guidance is inconsistent with this monorepo's mixed test runners; AGENTS still states root 'bun test' as the all-tests command, while service command and feature implementation require workspace-filtered test scripts.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/nbbaier/.factory/missions/6a598d16-5593-4a62-9543-6f0eb0e142be/AGENTS.md:48 vs /Users/nbbaier/68kb/.factory/services.yaml command 'test: cd /Users/nbbaier/68kb/app && bun run --filter @68kb/server test && bun run --filter @68kb/client test'.

summary: Reviewed feature project-scaffolding for milestone foundation-auth using its handoff, commit diff (f22afc0), transcript skeleton, and setup-worker skill. Result is PASS: required scaffolding behavior is present and verified. Logged one non-blocking code issue (DB default path consistency) and two shared-state documentation gaps.
